

## Net Spending

{{< include ../../../../../../../templates/reports/trial/_fig_net_spending_pair.qmd >}}

## Gross Income

{{< include ../../../../../../../templates/reports/trial/_fig_gross_income_pair.qmd >}}

## Taxes

```{python}
#| label: fig-taxes
#| fig-cap: "Taxes over time for the nominal and today scenarios."
#| fig-subcap:
#|  - "Nominal dollars"
#|  - "Today's dollars"
#| layout-ncol: 2
# Nominal
plan.setDefaultPlots("nominal")
x = plan.showTaxes()
# Today
plan.setDefaultPlots("today")
x = plan.showTaxes()
```

## Sources

```{python}
#| label: fig-sources
#| fig-cap: "Sources over time for the nominal and today scenarios."
#| fig-subcap:
#|  - "Nominal dollars"
#|  - "Today's dollars"
#| layout-ncol: 2
# Nominal
plan.setDefaultPlots("nominal")
x = plan.showSources()
# Today
plan.setDefaultPlots("today")
x = plan.showSources()
```

## Accounts

```{python}
#| label: fig-accounts
#| fig-cap: "Accounts over time for the nominal and today scenarios."
#| fig-subcap:
#|  - "Nominal dollars"
#|  - "Today's dollars"
#| layout-ncol: 2
# Nominal
plan.setDefaultPlots("nominal")
x = plan.showAccounts()
# Today
plan.setDefaultPlots("today")
x = plan.showAccounts()
```

## Asset Composition

```{python}
#| label: fig-asset-composition
#| fig-cap: "Asset Composition over time for the nominal and today scenarios."
#| fig-subcap:
#|  - "Nominal dollars"
#|  - "Today's dollars"
#| layout-ncol: 2
# Nominal
plan.setDefaultPlots("nominal")
x = plan.showAssetComposition()
# Today
plan.setDefaultPlots("today")
x = plan.showAssetComposition()
```
